home.heroHeadline: One Eazy place for your family
home.heroSub: Shared calendars, to-do lists, messaging, and child-friendly events — all in one safe space built for your family.
home.f1d: Your family's data stays yours. TLS encryption and strict per-family access controls.
home.f2d: Sync schedules, to-dos and shopping lists instantly across all devices.
home.f3d: Find family-friendly activities, markets and events happening near you.
home.f4d: Connect with nearby parents, share tips and arrange playdates.
home.f5d: Your personal AI helper with voice-activated features to manage your family life hands-free.
home.f6d: A private space for your family to stay connected every day.
home.s1b: Sign up and set up your family profile in under a minute.
home.s2b: Share a link or code — family members join instantly.
home.s3b: Manage calendars, lists, events and messages together.
home.downloadSub: Use the web app now — native iOS and Android apps are coming soon with the same seamless sync.

about.heroHeadline: We're building a simple system for day-to-day family life
about.heroSub: Family life is full of moving parts — schedules, shopping, events, playdates, and constant communication. We built Eazy.Family to bring all of that into one private, calm space so families can spend less time managing and more time together.
about.v1b: Every decision we make starts with one question: does this make family life better?
about.v2b: We never sell your data. Your family's information is encrypted and only accessible to you.
about.v3b: Built with real parents — your feedback shapes every feature we build.
about.v4b: The daily app for your family, we've taken great care to make it simple and useful.
about.storyP1: Family life is beautiful. The days are long but the years are short and before you know it time has gone. Eazy.Family was built to make every moment count and remove the frustrations of daily life: too many apps and messaging channels, different calendars and separate shopping lists, searching for activities and events your children will enjoy. What's safe, what's not?
about.storyP2: Our goal was simple: one place, that's private and secure, helps you create lasting memories for your family and makes your daily life easier.

events.heroSub: Eazy.Family organises real-world, age-appropriate, events designed to bring your family and friends together — music, arts, storytelling, outdoor adventures, and more.
events.e1d: Interactive sessions for babies and toddlers, concerts for young children.
events.e2d: Creative workshops designed to spark imagination at every age.
events.e3d: Live reading sessions and theatrical stories for the little ones.
events.e4d: Guided nature walks, scavenger hunts and outdoor play.
events.comingSoonSub: Create a free account to know when events are coming to your area.

download.heroSub: Available on web now. Native iOS and Android apps are on the way.

download.notifyTitle: Get notified when the apps launch
